## Description
<!-- Provide a clear description of the change, design decisions, and general context. -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link related issue(s) here. e.g. Fixes #123 -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Chore / Documentation / Refactoring

## Quality Checklist
Before submitting this Pull Request, please ensure you have checked the following:

- [ ] **Formatting**: I have run `make fmt` (or `make fmt-fix` to apply formatting).
- [ ] **Vetting**: I have run `make vet` successfully.
- [ ] **Linting**: I have run `make lint` and fixed any warnings.
- [ ] **Testing**: I have run the full test suite (`make test`) and verified that all tests pass.
- [ ] **TDD Mandate**: My new logic or bug fix is covered by table-driven unit tests. If performance-critical, I've added matching benchmark tests (`func Benchmark...`).
- [ ] **Commits**: My commits follow atomic commits guidelines and do not contain `Co-authored-by` trailers (especially if generated by an AI assistant).
